articles.title: Aurora
articles.metaDescription: 1.25x over a well-trained static speculator. Aurora is an open-source RL framework that turns speculative decoding from a one-time offline setup into a self-improving system that learns from every req
articles.summary: Aurora is an open-source framework that turns speculative decoding from a one-time offline setup into a self-improving system. The system learns from every one of its users.
